verdict: 旧 deep-read 链路多层断裂;停止修旧 pipeline/Qdrant 当主线;转建 DocumentEnrichmentService

old_pipeline_breakpoints.task_profile: card-gen 钉死 local_text_deep, model_name 空, profile 不可用
old_pipeline_breakpoints.worker: 汇丰 6 任务 attempts=0 从未处理;全局 31 queued attempts=0;30min 跑别的客户
old_pipeline_breakpoints.global_doubao_switch: 无效, per-task profile 路由
old_pipeline_breakpoints.document_cards: 多数客户=0, hydrate 无原料
old_pipeline_breakpoints.qdrant: 全局零贡献 qdrant_hits=0, manifest indexed=0/stale, disk points=0

new_chain_design: v2_documents.markdown_content -> 豆包富化 -> knowledge_surrogates(rich)+knowledge_master_index.searchable_text(>=700字) -> bundle/lexical+v2_documents 检索 -> 模块命中; 状态复用 document_deep_read_states; 不以 Qdrant 验收
